mapper.select: SELECT IFNULL(SUM(apply_amount), 0) FROM company_reduction WHERE year = #{year} AND audit_status = 1
mapper.update: UPDATE company_reduction SET audit_status = #{auditStatus}, auditor_id = #{auditorId}, audit_opinion = #{auditOpinion}, audit_time = #{auditTime}, update_time = #{updateTime} WHERE id = #{id}
